title: Fireship: Claude Code superpower -- WKAppBot already integrates Claude agents
desc: Fireship covered Claude Code agentic capabilities / extended thinking (April 2026). WKAppBot already uses Claude as ask sub-agent and Vision API. No capability gap -- adopted.
steps: Fireship video: Claude Code agentic capabilities -- autonomously edits codebases, sub-agent orchestration, extended thinking for reasoning.
WKAppBot already integrates: wkappbot ask claude for sub-agent delegation, Vision API/Claude for OCR inference, triad routing (GPT+Gemini+Claude parallel).
Extended thinking benefits hardest OCR/vision calls -- not a workflow gap. Claude Code is the session tool itself.
Verdict: relevant-and-adopted. No new capabilities required -- WKAppBot's Claude integration already covers the announced superpower.
author: claude
